summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bolt.new clone AI App Builder after reported fixes. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success). Frontend mostly functional but TopBar project name display issue persists - still shows 'New Project' instead of actual project name when loading from dashboard.

ui_bugs.issue: TopBar still shows 'New Project' instead of actual project name when loading existing project from dashboard
ui_bugs.impact: User cannot see which project they're working on - reported as fixed but still present
ui_bugs.reproduction: 1. Login to dashboard 2. Click on existing project 3. TopBar shows 'New Project' instead of project name

passed_tests: Dashboard displays user projects correctly with proper names and metadata
Project cards are clickable and navigate to IDE
TopBar dropdown menu functionality (New Project, Dashboard, All Projects)
New Project button clears URL and resets state correctly
Project modification maintains same project_id (verified - key fix working)
Project content and files load correctly when navigating from dashboard
Dashboard navigation from TopBar dropdown works
All backend APIs return correct status codes (100% success)
AI code generation works with 90s timeout
User projects API returns proper project list
Project data persistence and retrieval working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix TopBar project name display in IDE.jsx - the loadProject function loads project data correctly but setProjectName(data.name || 'Untitled Project') is not updating the TopBar display. Check if there's a timing issue or state update problem in the TopBar component.

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All APIs working perfectly, AI generation successful, project modification fix verified
success_percentage.frontend: 85% - Core functionality works, project loading works, but TopBar name display issue persists
